creator: scheidell@secnap.net
text:
running portupgrade -PP on an amd64, 6.4 system gives this:

fetch: ftp://ftp.FreeBSD.orgpub/FreeBSD/ports/amd64/packages-6.4-release/Latest/makedepend.tbz:

(note the missing / between org and pub)

others have reported same problem on 7.1 amd64 systems as well:

http://forums.freebsd.org/showthread.php?t=2265
(rumored to be a problem with ruby18 version)

How-To-Repeat: on amd64 (6.4 or 7.1)

do a portupgrade -PP (select something).  observe output.
